## Summary
- High-level changes in 3-7 bullets
- Main modules touched

## Problem
- User/developer problem this solves
- Root cause or product gap

## Scope
- In scope
- Out of scope

## Design / Approach
- Key decisions and why
- Alternatives considered briefly
- Architecture or module-boundary notes

## Files Changed
- `path/to/file`: what changed and why

## Behavior Changes
- Before:
- After:

## Tests
- Automated:
  - `./gradlew ...`
- Manual:
  - Scenario and result

## Coverage Impact
- Affected non-UI layers and expected coverage impact
- If no automated coverage was added, explain why

## Risks / Rollback
- Potential risks
- Rollback plan

## Migration / Release Notes
- Migration needed? (`Yes/No`)
- User-facing release note summary
